variables.name: O2_dur
variables.description: Number of days the child was on oxygen.

variables.description: Total number of abortions the mother has had.

variables.description: Number of elective/voluntary abortions the mother has had.

variables.name: ab_spont
variables.description: Number of spontaneous abortions the mother has had.

variables.name: ante_hem
variables.description: Mother had antenatal hemorrhage or vaginal bleeding.

variables.description: Child has congenital anomalies or major malformations.

variables.name: ecmo
variables.description: Child was on extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) at some point.

variables.name: gaday
variables.description: Additional days of gestation after a specific week.

variables.description: Child ventilated using a conventional ventilator.

variables.description: Child ventilated using a high frequency flow interrupter.

variables.name: int_hfov
variables.description: Child ventilated using a high frequency oscillatory ventilator.

variables.description: Number of days the child was on nasal cpap.

variables.name: para
variables.description: Total number of live births the mother has had.

variables.description: Antibiotics administered during pregnancy or labor.

variables.name: pre_ster
variables.description: Steroids given before delivery; prenatal steroids given for fetal lung maturity, not for maternal disease.

variables.name: preeclamp
variables.description: Mother experienced pre-eclampsia during the pregnancy.

variables.name: race
variables.description: Which of the following best describes the child's race; reported by mother or father.

variables.description: These hours are in addition to duration of membrane rupture in days.

variables.description: Duration of membrane rupture before delivery in days.

variables.name: rop
variables.description: Child diagnosed with any retinopathy of prematurity.

variables.name: sepsis
variables.description: Child was diagnosed with sepsis and the diagnosis is confirmed by a positive blood, urine, or CSF culture.
